_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: Stage B strict tier reconciled to deterministic engine output and pending project-owner approval; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-label/legal-coverage spans for roadmap gap discovery.

_strict_reconciliation.method: must_detect rebuilt from PreSendReviewEngine strict findings; previous strict and ideal labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Neelivra Retail Technologies Limited by Yavnika Vector Private Limited (India)

Children’s data: Target states it does not onboard individuals under 18 without verifiable parental consent; a single consent withdrawal for a child account has been received and is pending suppression within 7 days before Closing

Post-closing integration: Buyer policies will align with the DPDPA and sectoral KYC norms; PAN/GSTIN of vendors will be collected through standard onboarding forms using illustrative IDs (e.g., 11AAAAA1111A1Z1) in test environments only
